mapper.select:
SELECT s.id, s.staff_id, st.Sid as staffSid, st.Sname as sname, d.Dname as dname, j.Jname as jname, s.month, s.actual_base_pay, s.overtime_pay, s.leave_days, s.leave_deduction, s.total_salary, s.status, s.calc_time, s.remarks,
COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attendance a WHERE a.staff_id = s.staff_id AND DATE_FORMAT(a.date, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(s.month, '%Y-%m') AND a.status = '迟到' ), 0) as late_count,
COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attendance a WHERE a.staff_id = s.staff_id AND DATE_FORMAT(a.date, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(s.month, '%Y-%m') AND a.status = '早退' ), 0) as early_leave_count,
COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attendance a WHERE a.staff_id = s.staff_id AND DATE_FORMAT(a.date, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(s.month, '%Y-%m') AND a.status = '迟到早退' ), 0) as late_early_count,
COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attendance a WHERE a.staff_id = s.staff_id AND DATE_FORMAT(a.date, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(s.month, '%Y-%m') AND a.status = '缺卡' ), 0) as missing_card_count,
COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM attendance a WHERE a.staff_id = s.staff_id AND DATE_FORMAT(a.date, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(s.month, '%Y-%m') AND a.status = '缺勤' ), 0) as absence_days,
COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) * (s.actual_base_pay / (SELECT CAST(value AS UNSIGNED) FROM config WHERE name='work_days_per_month') / 8 * 0.5) FROM attendance a WHERE a.staff_id = s.staff_id AND DATE_FORMAT(a.date, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(s.month, '%Y-%m') AND a.status = '缺卡' ), 0) as missing_card_deduction,
COALESCE(( SELECT (COUNT(CASE WHEN status = '迟到' THEN 1 END) * 0.02 + COUNT(CASE WHEN status = '早退' THEN 1 END) * 0.02 + COUNT(CASE WHEN status = '迟到早退' THEN 1 END) * 0.04) * (s.actual_base_pay / (SELECT CAST(value AS UNSIGNED) FROM config WHERE name='work_days_per_month')) FROM attendance a WHERE a.staff_id = s.staff_id AND DATE_FORMAT(a.date, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(s.month, '%Y-%m') AND a.status IN ('迟到', '早退', '迟到早退') ), 0) as late_deduction,
0 as absence_deduction,
GREATEST(0, (s.actual_base_pay + s.overtime_pay - s.total_salary) - COALESCE(s.leave_deduction, 0) - COALESCE(( SELECT COUNT(*) * (s.actual_base_pay / (SELECT CAST(value AS UNSIGNED) FROM config WHERE name='work_days_per_month') / 8 * 0.5) FROM attendance a WHERE a.staff_id = s.staff_id AND DATE_FORMAT(a.date, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(s.month, '%Y-%m') AND a.status = '缺卡' ), 0) - COALESCE(( SELECT (COUNT(CASE WHEN status = '迟到' THEN 1 END) * 0.02 + COUNT(CASE WHEN status = '早退' THEN 1 END) * 0.02 + COUNT(CASE WHEN status = '迟到早退' THEN 1 END) * 0.04) * (s.actual_base_pay / (SELECT CAST(value AS UNSIGNED) FROM config WHERE name='work_days_per_month')) FROM attendance a WHERE a.staff_id = s.staff_id AND DATE_FORMAT(a.date, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(s.month, '%Y-%m') AND a.status IN ('迟到', '早退', '迟到早退') ), 0) ) as other_deduction,
'考勤相关扣款' as other_deduction_remark
FROM salary s LEFT JOIN staffs st ON s.staff_id = st.id LEFT JOIN departments d ON st.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN jobs j ON st.job_id = j.id WHERE s.id = #{id}

SELECT s.id, s.staff_id, st.Sid as staffSid, st.Sname as sname, d.Dname as dname, j.Jname as jname, s.month, s.actual_base_pay, s.overtime_pay, s.leave_days, s.leave_deduction, s.total_salary, s.status, s.calc_time, s.remarks FROM salary s LEFT JOIN staffs st ON s.staff_id = st.id LEFT JOIN departments d ON st.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN jobs j ON st.job_id = j.id WHERE DATE_FORMAT(s.month, '%Y-%m') = #{month} ORDER BY st.dept_id, st.Sname

SELECT s.id, s.staff_id, st.Sid as staffSid, st.Sname as sname, d.Dname as dname, j.Jname as jname, s.month, s.actual_base_pay, s.overtime_pay, s.leave_days, s.leave_deduction, s.total_salary, s.status, s.calc_time, s.remarks FROM salary s LEFT JOIN staffs st ON s.staff_id = st.id LEFT JOIN departments d ON st.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN jobs j ON st.job_id = j.id WHERE s.staff_id = #{staffId} AND YEAR(s.month) = #{year} ORDER BY s.month DESC

SELECT s.id, s.staff_id, st.Sid as staffSid, st.Sname as sname, d.Dname as dname, j.Jname as jname, s.month, s.actual_base_pay, s.overtime_pay, s.leave_days, s.leave_deduction, s.total_salary, s.status, s.calc_time, s.remarks FROM salary s LEFT JOIN staffs st ON s.staff_id = st.id LEFT JOIN departments d ON st.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN jobs j ON st.job_id = j.id WHERE s.staff_id = #{staffId} AND DATE_FORMAT(s.month, '%Y-%m') = #{month} LIMIT 1
